message:
feat(refresh-ledger): emit_tracing_summary on cross-run comparator [coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.24]

Fourth ibuuh.24 slice this session. The prior commits built the
evidence pipeline:
- 1ffd8494 single-run RefreshLedgerEvidence vocabulary
- 95961840 .lexical-refresh-evidence.json per-publish sidecar
- e2e002ba RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison cross-run comparator

This commit adds the operator-facing tracing surface: a single call
to emit_tracing_summary turns a comparison into a structured event
operators see in default-level logs without running a benchmark
harness. Severity tiered to the regression magnitude:

- aggregate_duration_delta_pct >= +25.0 ⇒ warn
  ("significant slowdown vs previous publish" — surface in default
  logs so the operator sees it without dredging)
- aggregate_duration_delta_pct <= -10.0 ⇒ info
  ("notable improvement vs previous publish" — surface as a
  positive signal, less noisy than warn)
- otherwise ⇒ debug
  ("cross-run comparison" — high-volume noise on every publish;
  only visible at debug level)

Thresholds (+25%/-10%) are the "operator should look" signal levels,
NOT a hard regression gate. CI hard gates compare against benchmark
baselines with project-specific thresholds; this helper is for
ambient operator visibility.

Every emission carries:
- aggregate_duration_delta_pct + aggregate_throughput_delta_pct
  (raw numbers for log-pipeline consumers)
- aggregate_duration + aggregate_throughput (formatted "+12.34%"
  strings for human readability)
- dominant_phase_shift (e.g. "scan->persist") regardless of
  severity tier — a hot-phase change is itself a regression signal
  worth surfacing even when absolute totals look similar
- phase_count

One golden gate
(evidence_comparison_emit_tracing_summary_uses_correct_severity_tier)
pins the tier-routing math directly, including:
- Three baseline cases (+50% slowdown ⇒ warn, -25% improvement ⇒
  info, +5% steady-state ⇒ debug) with message-text invariants.
- Boundary cases (exactly +25% ⇒ warn, exactly -10% ⇒ info) so a
  regression in inclusive-vs-exclusive threshold semantics trips
  immediately.
- None duration delta ⇒ debug (defensive degenerate-case branch).

26/26 lib indexer::refresh_ledger tests green via
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/rch_target_cass_p2 cargo test
--lib indexer::refresh_ledger.

Future ibuuh.24 slice wires emit_tracing_summary into the
persist_lexical_refresh_ledger flow: read the prior persisted
evidence sidecar, call current.compare_to(prior).emit_tracing_summary().
That gives operators "this rebuild was N% slower than the previous"
in their logs automatically on every publish.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
